canonical_question: What is the difference between Dell Boomi AtomSphere and Boomi Flow - when to use each?
aliases: Boomi Integration vs Boomi Flow comparison
When to use Boomi AtomSphere vs Flow
Boomi iPaaS vs Boomi low-code workflow platform
Boomi data integration vs workflow automation
constraints: Boomi Integration and Boomi Flow are separate modules -- they are NOT interchangeable
Flow has NO data transformation engine -- delegate to Integration for ETL
Integration has NO user-facing UI -- delegate to Flow for human-in-the-loop
Flow is cloud-only (AWS VPCs) -- no self-hosted runtime option exists
Combined usage requires AtomSphere Service Connector configuration in Flow
Flow licensing may require per-user fees for external-facing workflows

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User only needs Integration runtime limits and capabilities

related_to.label: Boomi AtomSphere platform capabilities, limits & pricing

inputs_needed.question: What is your primary need?
options: data integration (connecting systems, ETL, API orchestration)

inputs_needed.question: Do end users interact with the process?
options: yes -- users need forms, approvals, or task assignments

inputs_needed.question: Do you need on-premise deployment?
options: must run on-premise (data residency, firewall constraints)
